'''Breen''' was one of the [[Affytechan]]s taken aboard the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], where he was indoctrinated into believing he was a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}

[[Category:Healers and doctors]]
